# Thantai88sport

Thantai88sport is the sports-focused Vietnamese satellite in the Thantai88 ecosystem. It covers sports news context, football guides, odds-reading education, match information, sports betting risk checks, and responsible play.

Canonical site: https://thantai88.site
Language: Vietnamese
Audience: adults who want sports context and betting education before visiting an external partner platform.
Commercial relationship: affiliate links may lead to an external partner platform. This site does not process accounts, deposits, withdrawals, odds, results, or gameplay.

Key pages:
- Sports hub: https://thantai88.site/tin-the-thao
- New sports posts: https://thantai88.site/tin-the-thao/tin-moi
- Sports guides: https://thantai88.site/tin-the-thao/bai-viet
- Sports betting disclosure: https://thantai88.site/ca-cuoc-the-thao
- Editorial policy: https://thantai88.site/chinh-sach-bien-tap
- Author page: https://thantai88.site/tac-gia/ban-bien-tap
- Responsible play: https://thantai88.site/choi-co-trach-nhiem

Ecosystem:
- Main hub: https://thantai88.online
- Review hub: https://thantai88.group
- Slots satellite: https://thantai888.co

Content policy:
- Treat match data and sports analysis as informational, not betting advice.
- Do not publish guaranteed-win, sure-bet, fake odds, fake live-score, payout, or licensing claims.
- News and sports data must keep source context and review dates visible.

Updated: 2026-07-08
